case_title: DERRICK SPIVA ET AL VS. TABERNACLE COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-15-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-16-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

WRONGFUL EVICTION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPIVA, DERRICK AN INDIVIDUAL LEAVITT, RUSSELL AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT TABERNACLE COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AYS MANAGEMENT A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM UNKNOWN NEWSOME, KEVIN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-15-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-13-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-22-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-16-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-12-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
